primary_angle.title: The Exact Fit: 40.35mm. 0.7mm. 22mm.
primary_angle.core_message: Cradle Adapter V1 is engineered to match the Royal Pop’s dimensions precisely—no gaps, no wobble, no afterthought. The first wrist conversion kit designed for the watch, not the other way around.
primary_angle.why_this_wins: Leverages the audience’s obsession with engineering precision (Trend Cluster: Precision Engineering Obsession, audience_fit_score=10). Directly addresses the tension of distrust in generic straps by highlighting exact specs. Aligns with past high-engagement hooks (e.g., '40.35mm. 0.7mm. 22mm. Exact fit, engineered.').
primary_angle.audience: Royal Pop owners and watch enthusiasts who prioritize fit, finish, and engineering detail over novelty or price.
primary_angle.desired_reaction: Acknowledgment of the adapter’s precision ('This actually fits'), curiosity about material and durability, and intent to join the waitlist to secure a kit before competitors flood the market with generic alternatives.

supporting_angle.title: Eight Colourways, One Engineering Standard
supporting_angle.purpose: Reinforce the premium positioning by showcasing the 8 FKM rubber colourways (Monochrome, Arctic Blue, Cobalt Orange, Turquoise Pink, Blue Acht, Green Eight, Otto Rosso, Huit Blanc) as deliberate design choices, not afterthoughts. Addresses the 'needs colour match' objection while maintaining focus on engineering consistency across all variants. Aligns with today’s calendar focus (Product variations) without diluting the primary angle.

content_decision.goal: Demonstrate the adapter’s exact fit and material quality through close-up shots of the 40.35mm socket, 0.7mm lip, and 22mm lug width. Show the adapter in all 8 colourways, emphasizing the FKM rubber’s texture and finish. End with a side-by-side comparison of the adapter on a Royal Pop vs. a generic strap (without naming competitors).
content_decision.hook_direction: Open with a tight close-up of the Royal Pop’s case back, then cut to the adapter sliding into place with a satisfying click. Overlay text: '40.35mm. 0.7mm. 22mm. Engineered for the Royal Pop.'
content_decision.conversion_role: Drive waitlist signups by positioning the adapter as the only precision-engineered solution. Use the Reel’s caption to direct viewers to comment 'WRIST' for the waitlist link.

creative_direction.tone: Calm confidence, engineering-led, design literate. Avoid hype; let the precision speak for itself.
creative_direction.pace: Slow, deliberate cuts. Focus on details (e.g., the 0.7mm lip, FKM rubber texture) with 2-3 second holds. No rapid-fire edits.
creative_direction.visual_energy: High contrast, macro shots. Use a neutral background to highlight the adapter’s colourways. Avoid flashy transitions or filters.
must_show: Cradle Adapter V1 in all 8 colourways
Adapter clipped onto a Royal Pop (front and side views)
must_not_do: Use vague language like 'premium' without engineering context
Imply affiliation with Swatch or Audemars Piguet
Show unapproved or speculative product specs

success_metric.primary: Waitlist signups (target: 500 new signups within 24 hours of Reel posting)
success_metric.secondary: Engagement rate (likes + comments + shares) > 8% of views, with >60% of comments asking about fit, material, or availability

brief_for_copy.script_goal: Reinforce the adapter’s precision and material quality. Script should be concise (15-20 seconds), with no voiceover—let the visuals and text overlays carry the message. Example structure: [Hook: 40.35mm. 0.7mm. 22mm.] → [Problem: Generic straps don’t fit.] → [Solution: Cradle Adapter V1, engineered for the Royal Pop.] → [CTA: Comment 'WRIST' for waitlist link.]
brief_for_copy.caption_goal: Expand on the adapter’s engineering (e.g., 'The Royal Pop’s case back isn’t just a design—it’s a challenge. 40.35mm socket. 0.7mm retaining lip. 22mm lug width. Cradle Adapter V1 is the first wrist conversion kit engineered to match these dimensions precisely. No gaps. No wobble. No afterthought.') and include the CTA: 'Join the waitlist to secure yours before the first batch sells out. Comment WRIST and I’ll send the link.'
brief_for_copy.cta_language: Direct and action-oriented: 'Comment WRIST for the waitlist link.' Avoid urgency language like 'limited time' or 'act now.'
